author: Halfkin Rainbolt
review: I moved in shortly after the business was bought by a new company. I have had a wonderful experience with the management and no problems to speak of. The maintenance is good and friendly. I recommend this to others. I have no idea what the poster was talking about a methadone clinic across the street. I see no evidence of that.
